title: 'Tumhare Bhai Ne Ek Murder Maar Diya Hai': Delhi Boy Kills Man, Shamelessly Brags On Instagram | Viral Video
description: A shocking incident has come to light from Delhi, where a 18-year-old boy murdered a man and then posted a video on Instagram, excitedly bragging about having taken someone's life. The victim is said to have been stabbed 10 times.
